message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Worker for T5 Task CRUD API">
You are worker-5, member of team dev-taskflow-m1m2m3m6.
Superior: Team Lead (TL).
Allowed contacts: TL only.

YOUR TASK:
T5: M2 — Task CRUD API
Build TaskService, TaskController, TaskRequest DTO, and PageResponse DTO.

Acceptance criteria (M2 AC1-AC16):
- POST /api/tasks: validate → create (status=TODO, createdBy from JWT SecurityContext) → 201 with full TaskResponse
- Default priority = MEDIUM if not specified
- GET /api/tasks/{id}: find non-deleted by id → 200 or 404
- PUT /api/tasks/{id}: validate → update title/description/priority + set updatedAt → 200 or 404
- DELETE /api/tasks/{id}: soft-delete (deleted=true) → 204 or 404
- GET /api/tasks: pageable (page,size,sort default=createdAt,desc), keyword filter (title LIKE case-insensitive), priority filter → PageResponse
- TaskRequest: title(@NotBlank @Size max=200), description(@Size max=5000), priority(optional)
- PageResponse: content(List), page(int), size(int), totalElements(long), totalPages(int)
- Extract createdBy from SecurityContext principal (Long userId from JWT)

File Scope:
- ALLOWED: taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/service/TaskService.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/controller/TaskController.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/TaskRequest.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/PageResponse.java
- READONLY: taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/Task.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/TaskStatus.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/repository/TaskRepository.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/TaskResponse.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/security/JwtUtil.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/exception/GlobalExceptionHandler.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/exception/ResourceNotFoundException.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/controller/AuthController.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/service/AuthService.java
- Everything else: FORBIDDEN

REQUIRED READING (do this FIRST):
1. PLAN: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/2026-03-09-E3/2026-03-09-PLAN.md
2. CONTRACT: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/2026-03-09-E3/2026-03-09-CONTRACT.md
3. Test files: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/controller/TaskControllerTest.java
4. Implementation notes: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/2026-03-09-E3/temp/impl-notes-5.md
5. ALL READONLY files

YOUR JOB:
- Write code that passes ALL 28 tests in TaskControllerTest
- Extract userId from SecurityContext: Authentication.getPrincipal() returns Long
- Use TaskRepository methods for filtering (check what methods exist)
- Use GlobalExceptionHandler for error responses (already handles validation + ResourceNotFoundException)

PARALLEL AWARENESS:
ONLY run YOUR tests:
cd C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend && mvn test -Dtest="TaskControllerTest" -pl .

SCOPE ENFORCEMENT:
- ALLOWED: edit freely
- READONLY: read only
- Everything else: FORBIDDEN

LOG WRITING:
Write to C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/2026-03-09-E3/logs/worker-5.log.md

COMPLETION SEQUENCE:
1. Verify all 28 tests pass
1.5. git diff --name-only → compare against ALLOWED. Revert out-of-scope.
2. Write final log entries
3. SendMessage TL: task ID, status, tests, changed files
4. Wait for shutdown
</teammate-message>

1→[SECTION] Project Overview
     2→[GOAL] Implement TaskFlow backend (Auth+CRUD+StateMachine) and frontend (TaskListPage) as a Spring Boot 3 + Vue 3 full-stack app
     3→[ARCH] Spring Boot 3.2.3 + H2 in-memory | Spring Security + JWT (jjwt 0.12.5) | Vue 3 + Pinia + Vue Router + Axios | Vitest + jsdom for frontend tests | spring-boot-starter-test for backend tests
     4→[NAMING] Java: camelCase fields, PascalCase classes, package com.taskflow.{layer} | Vue: PascalCase components, camelCase props/methods | DTO suffix for data transfer objects (e.g. TaskResponse, RegisterRequest)
     5→[CONSTRAINTS] Max 5 ALLOWED files per task | Soft-delete for tasks (deleted=true) | JWT 24h expiry | No M4/M5 — assignee shows "未指派", tags empty | H2 create-drop (no migrations)
     6→[SHARED] taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/Task.java | taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/TaskStatus.java | taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/config/SecurityConfig.java

[SECTION] Project Overview
[GOAL] Implement TaskFlow backend (Auth+CRUD+StateMachine) and frontend (TaskListPage) as a Spring Boot 3 + Vue 3 full-stack app
[ARCH] Spring Boot 3.2.3 + H2 in-memory | Spring Security + JWT (jjwt 0.12.5) | Vue 3 + Pinia + Vue Router + Axios | Vitest + jsdom for frontend tests | spring-boot-starter-test for backend tests
[NAMING] Java: camelCase fields, PascalCase classes, package com.taskflow.{layer} | Vue: PascalCase components, camelCase props/methods | DTO suffix for data transfer objects (e.g. TaskResponse, RegisterRequest)
[CONSTRAINTS] Max 5 ALLOWED files per task | Soft-delete for tasks (deleted=true) | JWT 24h expiry | No M4/M5 — assignee shows "未指派", tags empty | H2 create-drop (no migrations)
[SHARED] taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/Task.java | taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/TaskStatus.java | taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/config/SecurityConfig.java

[SECTION] Standards
[SOURCE] none
[OVERRIDE] follow-actual-code | SecurityConfig already exists with JwtAuthenticationFilter import

[SECTION] Specs
[SPEC] id=S1 | name=M1-Authentication | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M1-auth.md
[SPEC] id=S2 | name=M2-Task-CRUD | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M2-task-crud.md
[SPEC] id=S3 | name=M3-Task-State-Machine | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M3-task-state-machine.md
[SPEC] id=S4 | name=M6-Task-List-Page | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M6-task-list-page.md

[SECTION] Cross-Cutting Concerns
[CROSS-CUTTING] error-format: {message:string, timestamp:ISO8601} via GlobalExceptionHandler | auth: JWT Bearer token in Authorization header, userId extracted from token claims | password: bcrypt via PasswordEncoder bean | soft-delete: Task.deleted=true, all queries exclude deleted | pagination: PageResponse{content,page,size,totalElements,totalPages} | status-colors: TODO=#6B7280 IN_PROGRESS=#3B82F6 DONE=#10B981 CLOSED=#EF4444 | priority-colors: HIGH=#EF4444 MEDIUM=#F59E0B LOW=#10B981

[SECTION] Tasks

[TASK] id=T6 | name=M3 — Task State Machine | spec=S3 | deps=T3,T4 | files=4 | complexity=LOW | reason=simple state transition logic, few files
[TASK] id=T7 | name=M6 — Frontend Infrastructure + Store | spec=S4 | deps=none | files=5 | complexity=HIGH | reason=Pinia store+axios+router, complex mocking in tests
[TASK] id=T8 | name=M6 — Frontend Task List Components | spec=S4 | deps=T7 | files=5 | complexity=HIGH | reason=5 Vue components, jsdom+vue-test-utils mocking

[SECTION] Task Dependency Graph

[WAVE] 1a=T1,T2,T4 | 1b=T7 | 2=T3 | 3a=T5,T6 | 3b=T8

     7→- Auth: register user via direct repo save + login via `/api/auth/login` to get JWT token
     8→- H2 in-memory database, `@Transactional` for test isolation
     9→

    11→1. `TaskRequest` DTO — with `@Valid` annotations: title (1-200, required), description (max 5000, optional), priority (optional, default MEDIUM)
    12→2. `TaskService` — CRUD logic using TaskRepository, soft-delete, pagination/filtering
    13→3. `TaskController` — REST endpoints at `/api/tasks`

    18→|----|-------------|-------------|

    20→| AC2 | createTask_noPriority_defaultsMedium | No priority -> MEDIUM |
    21→| AC3 | createTask_emptyTitle_returns400, createTask_noTitle_returns400 | Missing/empty title -> 400 |
    22→| AC4 | getTask_existing_returns200 | GET by id -> 200 |
    23→| AC5 | getTask_nonExisting_returns404 | GET non-existing id -> 404 |

file.content:
# Implementation Notes — T5: M2 Task CRUD API

## Test Design

### Dependencies
- Tests use `@SpringBootTest` + `@AutoConfigureMockMvc` (full integration tests)
- Auth: register user via direct repo save + login via `/api/auth/login` to get JWT token
- H2 in-memory database, `@Transactional` for test isolation

### Files Required by Implementation (not yet created)
1. `TaskRequest` DTO — with `@Valid` annotations: title (1-200, required), description (max 5000, optional), priority (optional, default MEDIUM)
2. `TaskService` — CRUD logic using TaskRepository, soft-delete, pagination/filtering
3. `TaskController` — REST endpoints at `/api/tasks`
4. `PageResponse` DTO — wrapper: content, page, size, totalElements, totalPages

### AC Coverage Map
| AC | Test Method | Description |
|----|-------------|-------------|
| AC1 | createTask_validData_returns201 | POST valid task -> 201 with id, createdBy, createdAt |
| AC2 | createTask_noPriority_defaultsMedium | No priority -> MEDIUM |
| AC3 | createTask_emptyTitle_returns400, createTask_noTitle_returns400 | Missing/empty title -> 400 |
| AC4 | getTask_existing_returns200 | GET by id -> 200 |
| AC5 | getTask_nonExisting_returns404 | GET non-existing id -> 404 |
| AC6 | updateTask_valid_returns200WithUpdatedAt | PUT -> 200 with updatedAt |
| AC7 | deleteTask_existing_returns204 | DELETE -> 204 soft delete |
| AC8 | listTasks_excludesSoftDeleted | GET list excludes deleted |
| AC9 | getTask_softDeleted_returns404 | GET soft-deleted -> 404 |
| AC10 | listTasks_defaultPagination | Default page=0, size=20, sort=createdAt desc |
| AC11 | listTasks_keywordFilter | keyword search case-insensitive |
| AC12 | listTasks_priorityFilter | priority=HIGH filter |
| AC13 | listTasks_pagination | page=1&size=5 correct second page |
| AC14 | createTask_noToken_returns401 | No auth -> 401 |
| AC15 | createTask_titleTooLong_returns400 | title >200 -> 400 |
| AC16 | createTask_descriptionTooLong_returns400 | description >5000 -> 400 |

### Key Design Decisions
- Helper method `registerAndGetToken()` follows AuthControllerTest pattern
- Helper method `createTaskJson()` builds JSON map for flexibility
- `@BeforeEach` clears both task and user repos for isolation
- Nested test classes group by feature: Create, Read, Update, Delete, List, Auth

input.content:
# Worker-5 Log: T5 — M2 Task CRUD API

## Task
Build TaskService, TaskController, TaskRequest DTO, and PageResponse DTO for Task CRUD operations.

## Files Created
1. `taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/TaskRequest.java` — DTO with @NotBlank @Size(max=200) title, @Size(max=5000) description, optional priority
2. `taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/PageResponse.java` — Generic page wrapper with content, page, size, totalElements, totalPages
3. `taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/service/TaskService.java` — CRUD + list with pagination/filtering, soft-delete, default priority=MEDIUM
4. `taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/controller/TaskController.java` — REST endpoints POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/tasks, userId from SecurityContext

## Test Results
- **28/28 tests PASS** (TaskControllerTest)
- BUILD SUCCESS in ~15s

## Scope Check
- All 4 files are within ALLOWED scope
- No modifications to READONLY or FORBIDDEN files

## Key Implementation Details
- TaskRequest uses Jakarta validation: @NotBlank + @Size(max=200) for title, @Size(max=5000) for description
- Default priority MEDIUM applied in TaskService.createTask when priority is null
- Soft-delete: deleteTask sets deleted=true; getTask/listTasks filter out deleted tasks
- userId extracted from SecurityContext via `(Long) authentication.getPrincipal()`
- Pagination defaults: page=0, size=20, sort=createdAt DESC
- Filtering: keyword -> findByDeletedFalseAndTitleContainingIgnoreCase; priority -> findByDeletedFalseAndPriority

content.content: File created successfully at: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/2026-03-09-E3/logs/worker-5.log.md

# Worker-5 Log: T5 — M2 Task CRUD API

## Task
Build TaskService, TaskController, TaskRequest DTO, and PageResponse DTO for Task CRUD operations.

## Files Created
1. `taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/TaskRequest.java` — DTO with @NotBlank @Size(max=200) title, @Size(max=5000) description, optional priority
2. `taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/PageResponse.java` — Generic page wrapper with content, page, size, totalElements, totalPages
3. `taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/service/TaskService.java` — CRUD + list with pagination/filtering, soft-delete, default priority=MEDIUM
4. `taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/controller/TaskController.java` — REST endpoints POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/tasks, userId from SecurityContext

## Test Results
- **28/28 tests PASS** (TaskControllerTest)
- BUILD SUCCESS in ~15s

## Scope Check
- All 4 files are within ALLOWED scope
- No modifications to READONLY or FORBIDDEN files

## Key Implementation Details
- TaskRequest uses Jakarta validation: @NotBlank + @Size(max=200) for title, @Size(max=5000) for description
- Default priority MEDIUM applied in TaskService.createTask when priority is null
- Soft-delete: deleteTask sets deleted=true; getTask/listTasks filter out deleted tasks
- userId extracted from SecurityContext via `(Long) authentication.getPrincipal()`
- Pagination defaults: page=0, size=20, sort=createdAt DESC
- Filtering: keyword -> findByDeletedFalseAndTitleContainingIgnoreCase; priority -> findByDeletedFalseAndPriority
